# The Laurel Room
> Brampton's premier boutique event venue for intimate celebrations of 50-125 guests.

## About
The Laurel Room is a boutique event venue in Brampton, Ontario, opening Summer 2026. We offer a BYOC (Bring Your Own Caterer) model with five curated design presets in an intimate space with 18-foot ceilings and a fairy light canopy.

## Services
- Venue rental for 50-125 guests
- Five curated design presets: Laurel, Golden Hour, Blush, Monochrome, Regal
- Three package tiers: The Space (from $895), The Styled Experience (from $1,695), The Full Celebration (from $2,495)
- Signature packages: Mehndi Night ($2,195), Morning Celebration ($1,095), Corporate Retreat ($795)
- BYOC - Bring Your Own Caterer, any cuisine welcome

## Event Types
Mehndi nights, baby showers, bridal showers, intimate weddings, nikkah ceremonies, milestone birthdays, aqiqah/naming ceremonies, engagement parties, corporate retreats, holiday celebrations (Diwali, Eid, Christmas)

## Location
Brampton, Ontario, Canada — Steeles Ave East Corridor

## Contact
Email: hello@thelaurelroom.ca
Instagram: @thelaurelroom
Website: https://thelaurelroom.ca
